description_long: This is a sleek, angular airplane with a predominantly matte black exterior and sharp, faceted surfaces. The fuselage is compact and wide, with two prominent engine nacelles mounted on either side near the rear, each featuring blue-lit exhausts. The wings are short, swept, and integrated into the body, giving the aircraft a futuristic, stealth-inspired appearance. The tail section rises sharply with a single vertical stabilizer, while the nose is pointed and features a small, blue-tinted sensor or light. Blue accent lines and illuminated elements are visible along the engines and wing roots, adding to its high-tech look. The cockpit is centrally located at the front, with a faceted canopy blending into the fuselage.
description: A futuristic, matte black airplane with angular lines, blue-lit engines, and a compact, stealthy design. Features a pointed nose, swept wings, and a single vertical tail fin.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, central cockpit canopy, and the wide, angular wings with blue-lit engine intakes on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sharply rising tail fin, the compact fuselage, and the rear-mounted engine nacelles with blue-lit exhausts.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin blue-lit engine exhausts, the angular wing roots, and the faceted tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same tail fin, engine nacelle, and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept configuration with integrated wing roots and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage, with blue-lit exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with a conventional tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
